query:
INSERT INTO snake_health_status (battlesnake_id, consecutive_failures, last_checked_at, last_failure)
         VALUES ($1, 1, NOW(), $2)
         ON CONFLICT (battlesnake_id) DO UPDATE
            SET consecutive_failures = snake_health_status.consecutive_failures + 1,
                last_checked_at = NOW(),
                last_failure = $2,
                updated_at = NOW()
         RETURNING consecutive_failures
